creator: rodrigo@FreeBSD.org
text:
I did the test for this port in the following conditions :

Build the port in 10.0-RELEASE with clang : OK
Build the port in 10.0-RELEASE with gcc48 : OK
Build the port in  9.1-RELEASE with gcc48 : OK

So, to me everything is fine. If you agree I think we can close the PR
